cycles_used.description: How many cycles the run used.

actor_prompt_rewrite.description: Full new actor system prompt. Must be same size or shorter than current. Empty string if no change.

planner_prompt_rewrite.description: Full new planner system prompt. Must be same size or shorter than current. Empty string if no change.

actor_schema_rewrite.description: Full new actor_schema.json content if the actor output format needs to change (add/remove/rename fields). Empty string if no change. Must be valid JSON schema.

planner_schema_rewrite.description: Full new planner_schema.json content if the planner output format needs to change. Empty string if no change. Must be valid JSON schema.

patterns_that_failed.description: Action patterns that failed or caused loops.
